hero.label: Welcome
hero.title: Relax in the heart of nature
hero.description: Comfortable accommodation in a peaceful setting near Rajecké Teplice. An ideal place for relaxation, trips and special moments with family or friends.

features.label: Why choose us
features.title: A place where you can truly relax

location.title: Pleasant surroundings in the centre of Rajecké Teplice
location.text: The cottage is located in a pleasant setting right in the centre of Rajecké Teplice, close to everything you need for a comfortable stay.

sport.title: A great place for sports and activities
sport.text: The surrounding area offers excellent opportunities for sports, walks, hiking and active relaxation throughout your stay.

capacity.title: An ideal place for 2 to 6 guests
capacity.text: The cottage is a perfect choice for couples, families and smaller groups of friends looking for comfort and privacy.

about.label: About the cottage
about.title: A peaceful place for your отдых
about.description: Our cottage is the perfect place for those looking for peace, comfort and nature within easy reach. Whether you are planning a weekend stay, a family trip or a relaxing getaway with friends, you will find a welcoming atmosphere and everything you need to unwind.

niceToKnow.label: Nice to know
niceToKnow.title: Nice to know
niceToKnow.subtitle: Practical information to help you during your stay. Here you will find useful tips on how to use the cottage equipment so you can enjoy a comfortable and hassle-free stay.

electricity.title: Turning on the electricity
electricity.text: After arrival, please switch on the main circuit breaker located behind the entrance door. Once turned on, electricity will be available throughout the cottage and all appliances can be used.

fridge.title: Fridge
fridge.text: The fridge can be switched on using the switch located behind the refrigerator in the kitchen. Turn it to the ON position and close both the fridge and freezer doors so the cooling process can start.

water.title: Turning on the water
water.text: The water supply can be turned on in the basement. Behind the door near the floor there is a valve that needs to be turned left into a horizontal position. Once turned, water will be available in the cottage.

bathroomWater.title: Heating water in the bathroom
bathroomWater.text: There is a switch with a light on the outside of the bathroom. When the light is on, the boiler is heating the water. Heating takes approximately one hour. We recommend avoiding showering while the water is heating to allow it to warm up properly.

wifi.title: WiFi
wifi.text: You can connect to WiFi using the QR code. The cottage is equipped with optical internet, providing a fast and stable connection during your stay.

keys.title: Keys
keys.text: The blue key is for the outer gate. For the entrance door, use the red key for the upper lock and the key with the white dot for the lower lock.

towels.title: Towels
towels.text: Towels are prepared for you in the living room, in the red cabinet under the TV. Feel free to use them during your stay.

bedLinen.title: Bed linen
bedLinen.text: Bed linen is located in the wardrobe in the bedroom. Sheets can be found in the bottom drawer. After your stay, please place the used bed linen into the laundry basket in the bathroom.

portableRadiator.title: Portable radiator control
portableRadiator.text: Turn on the portable radiator using the button on the side. Then press 'Turn On', select 'TEMP', set the desired temperature and confirm with the OK button. The radiator will then start heating.

bathroomRadiator.title: Bathroom radiator control
bathroomRadiator.text: The bathroom radiator can be switched on using the button on the side. Above the radiator you will find the control for adjusting the heating intensity.

about.title: About Our Cottage
about.historyText: Built in the early 20th century, our cottage has been lovingly restored to preserve its original charm while providing modern comforts.

gallery.label: Gallery
gallery.title: Take a look at our cottage
gallery.subtitle: Discover photos of the interior, exterior and surroundings of the cottage.

photos.label: Photos
photos.title: Photo gallery
photos.description: Browse selected photos of the cottage and its surroundings. You can explore the atmosphere, interior and exterior even before your stay.

plan.label: Floor plan
plan.title: Cottage floor plan
plan.description: For a better overview, you can also view the cottage floor plan and get a clear idea of the layout.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: If you have any questions about your stay or would like to make a reservation, feel free to contact us. We will be happy to help and provide you with all the information you need.
